summary: Product Validation 'Insufficient Data' Bug Fix - VERIFIED WORKING. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All 3 products tested show real recommendations (NOT 'Insufficient Data'). The fix correctly uses 'view_growth_rate' instead of 'trend_velocity' and 'supplier_order_velocity' instead of 'supplier_orders'.
passed_tests: Backend: test_recommendation_label_not_insufficient - Label is NOT 'Insufficient Data - Cannot Validate'
Backend: test_strengths_array_populated - Strengths are populated with real values
Backend: test_weaknesses_no_missing_data - No 'Missing data:' in weaknesses array
Backend: test_confidence_above_minimum - Confidence >= 25% for all products
Backend: test_success_probability_above_zero - Success probability > 0% for all products
Backend: test_validation_details_have_signals - All 6 signals present (TREND, MARGIN, COMPETITION, AD ACTIVITY, SUPPLIER, ENGAGEMENT)
Backend: test_trend_analysis_uses_view_growth_rate - Trend analysis works with view_growth_rate field
Backend: test_success_prediction_uses_fallback_fields - Success prediction works with fallback fields
Frontend: Product 2e3d8782-0026-4fef-a04a-a1d3426e2d26 shows 'Launch Opportunity' badge (NOT 'Insufficient Data')
Frontend: Product 7325ad3e-33e7-4d48-8c5f-098402adbb06 shows 'Promising - Monitor Closely' badge
Frontend: 'Should You Launch This Product?' section displays meaningful summary text
Frontend: Launch Score Breakdown shows all 5 scores (TREND, MARGIN, COMPETITION, AD ACTIVITY, SUPPLIER)
Frontend: No 'Missing data:' text found on product detail pages

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Most products show 'Insufficient Data - Cannot Validate' making users doubt data validity
bugs_verified_fixed.root_cause: ProductValidationEngine._analyze_trend_velocity looked for 'trend_velocity' but products have 'view_growth_rate'. _analyze_supplier_demand looked for 'supplier_orders' but products have 'supplier_order_velocity'
fix_details: Line 223: trend_velocity = product.get('trend_velocity') or product.get('view_growth_rate') or 0
Line 466: supplier_orders = product.get('supplier_orders') or product.get('supplier_order_velocity') or 0
Line 583-598: Confidence calculation adjusted (base 60, penalty -5, moderate bonus +3)
bugs_verified_fixed.verification: All 3 tested products now show 'Launch Opportunity' or 'Promising' instead of 'Insufficient Data'

critical_code_review_comments: product_validation.py line 223: Correctly uses fallback view_growth_rate when trend_velocity is null
product_validation.py line 466: Correctly uses fallback supplier_order_velocity when supplier_orders is null
success_prediction.py line 150: Also updated with same fallback pattern for consistency
success_prediction.py line 226: Also updated with same fallback pattern for consistency
MIN_CONFIDENCE threshold of 25% is reasonable - allows products with partial data to still get recommendations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product validation 'Insufficient Data' bug is FIXED. The validation engine now correctly uses field fallbacks (view_growth_rate, supplier_order_velocity) when primary field names don't exist. Products show real recommendations: 'Launch Opportunity' (score >= 65), 'Promising - Monitor Closely' (score >= 45), 'High Risk' (score < 45). Confidence calculation was also adjusted to be less punishing for missing data. All 3 tested products show meaningful recommendations with score breakdowns.
